description_long: This is a modern square dining table set with four matching chairs, all featuring a minimalist design. The tabletop and chair seats and backs are made of light-colored wood with a natural grain, while the legs and supporting frames are constructed from black metal, giving a sturdy and contemporary appearance. The table has a simple, flat surface with no visible drawers or embellishments, and the chairs are designed with straight backs and square seats for comfort and symmetry. The set is compact, making it suitable for small dining areas, cafes, or urban patios. The clean lines and lack of ornamentation emphasize functionality and modern aesthetics. The materials and construction suggest durability for frequent use in communal or public spaces.
description: A modern square wooden table with black metal legs, accompanied by four matching chairs with wooden seats and backs. The set features clean lines and a minimalist, urban design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the table and all four chairs, with the closest chair directly facing the viewer.
description_view_1: Direct front view with the table and the nearest chair fully visible, highlighting the symmetry of the set.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back of the closest chair and the arrangement of the other chairs around the table.
description_view_3: Direct rear view with the back of the nearest chair and the table surface clearly visible.
